calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Co-Defendant: Louis R. Cortez.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Howard Chung, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Tom, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Kosta Kosmann aka Juergen Kosmann.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief, received and filed in court.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 76 Santa Ysabel Terrace, San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent $2,200.00
Holdover Damages $1,714.72
Attorney Fees $660.00
Costs $387.50, for a Total of $4,962.22
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Off Calendar
